channel.title: Email on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Email on Arrans github.io

item.title: resend/react-email
item.description: 💌 Build and send emails using React

item.title: novuhq/novu
item.description: The open-source notification infrastructure. In-app Inbox component, E-mail, SMS, Push and Slack Integrations.

item.title: deltachat/deltachat-desktop
item.description: Decentralized private messenger with chat-shared tools and games for Desktop

item.title: bulwarkmail/webmail
item.description: Webmail built for the 21st Century. A modern, self-hosted email client for Stalwart Mail Server powered by the JMAP protocol. Email, calendar, contacts and files. Fast, private, and open source.

item.title: rustmailer/bichon
item.description: Bichon – A lightweight, high-performance Rust email archiver with WebUI

item.title: deltachat/deltachat-android
item.description: Decentralized private messenger with chat-shared tools and games for Android

item.title: wneessen/go-mail
item.description: 📧 Easy to use, yet comprehensive library for sending mails with Go

item.title: dittofeed/dittofeed
item.description: Open-source customer engagement. Automate transactional and marketing messages across email, SMS, mobile push, WhatsApp, Slack, and more 📨

item.title: kurrier-org/kurrier
item.description: Kurrier is a modern, self-hosted workspace for email, calendar, contacts and storage.

item.title: linagora/tmail-flutter
item.description: A multi-platform (Flutter) application for reading your emails, with your favorite devices, using the JMAP protocol!

item.title: Dacid99/Eonvelope
item.description: Preserve your emails with this open-source self-hostable email archive! This repository is a read-only mirror, please go to the gitlab repo at https://gitlab.com/Dacid99/eonvelope to contribute code.

item.title: jhillyerd/enmime
item.description: MIME mail encoding and decoding package for Go

item.title: preslavrachev/gomjml
item.description: A native Go implementation of the MJML email framework, providing fast compilation of MJML markup to responsive HTML.

item.title: domodwyer/mailyak
item.description: An elegant MIME/SMTP email library with support for attachments

item.title: Enough-Software/enough_mail_app
item.description: Mail app for iOS, Android and hopefully more platforms in the future. Based on Flutter.

item.title: rockorager/go-jmap
item.description: JMAP client library for go (mirror of git.sr.ht/~rockorager/go-jmap)
